_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin regulates metabolic rate via neuronal mechanisms in Drosophila.

_contextSnippet: To examine the effect of Nf1 loss-of-function on downstream canonical MAP kinase signaling, we also examined phosphorylated ERK (pERK) and total ERK. In both Nf1 P1 mutants and Nf1 RNAi lines, there was an increase in pERK
details: Successfully detected increased phosphorylated ERK levels in both Nf1 P1 mutants and Nf1 RNAi lines by western blot
